name: Turmeric Golden Oats
description: Warm, comforting oatmeal loaded with anti-inflammatory spices and antioxidant-rich toppings.
recipeInstructions: Combine rolled oats and unsweetened almond milk in a saucepan over medium heat. Bring to a gentle simmer, stirring occasionally.
Stir in ground turmeric, ground cinnamon, ground ginger, and black pepper. Cook, stirring, until oats are creamy and thick.
Remove from heat. Stir in honey or maple syrup. Divide into bowls and top with fresh blueberries, roughly chopped walnuts, and chia seeds.
